findings.defect: Japanese 全角 corner brackets 「」 used inside Chinese definition (drone term); mainland 简体中文 standard uses "" curly quotes
findings.evidence_excerpt: 无人飞行器。「Drone」是无线遥控无人机的意思
findings.suggested_root_cause: Stage-5 translation preserved jp brackets in zh; Stage-7 punctuation-normalization gap

findings.defect: Japanese 「」 brackets in smart factory term zh
Japanese 「」 brackets in embedded-system term zh
Japanese 「」 brackets in RFI definition zh
findings.evidence_excerpt: 目的是「供应商初步筛选」与「收集技术信息」

findings.defect: Japanese 「」 brackets in green-procurement term zh
findings.evidence_excerpt: 以「绿色采购法」为契机得以普及

findings.defect: Nested parens（（））and faithful reproduction of broken-source Japanese yields awkward zh
findings.evidence_excerpt: 由于不进行所有复杂的测试，可能无法发现发生频率较低的缺陷（程序错误（Bug））
findings.suggested_root_cause: Stage-4 OCR or source / Stage-5 literal translation

findings.defect: A 'term' entry whose surface is a full sentence (paragraph as surface) — structural mis-extraction
findings.evidence_excerpt: surface.jp='関数の呼び出し時に引数を指定すると、その引数が関数に渡されます。' surface.zh='调用函数时指定参数，该参数会被传递给函数'

findings.defect: Code-example Japanese literals ('こんにちは', '山田さん') embedded in Chinese figure caption — likely intentional code-string preservation but reader may stumble
findings.evidence_excerpt: 输出 "こんにちは" / hello("山田さん")
输出示例：山田さんこんにちは

findings.defect: BSC table inconsistent within-page rendering 顾客 vs 客户 of same jp 顧客
findings.evidence_excerpt: 顾客视角 ... 从客户视角进行评价

findings.defect: Within-page two slightly different translations of 'jp:学習用のデータ' (学习用数据 / 用于学习的数据)
findings.evidence_excerpt: term: 用于学习的数据 ; table-row: 学习用数据

findings.defect: Awkward consecutive 的的: '通过...的组合的示意图'
Header gloss inconsistency: 'A NOR B（A或非B）' has zh gloss but neighbor 'A NAND B' does not
findings.evidence_excerpt: A NOR B（A或非B）vs A NAND B

findings.defect: Mixed Japanese corporate form 株式会社 with romaji name TekuTeku — culturally inert for mainland reader

notes: Most pervasive issue: residual Japanese 「」 corner brackets inside Chinese definitions across at least 6 pages (179, 225). Bounded but consistent Stage-5 / Stage-7 punctuation-normalization gap. No release-impacting (FAIL) defects from a reader-zh perspective on the 30-page sample.
